query:
-- Step 1: Update carbonMonthlyCost and monthlyCost for all carbon_api sourced services
UPDATE services
SET
  carbonMonthlyCost = ROUND(carbonMonthlyCost / 1.1, 2),
  monthlyCost = ROUND(monthlyCost / 1.1, 2)
WHERE costSource = 'carbon_api'
  AND carbonMonthlyCost IS NOT NULL
  AND carbonMonthlyCost > 0;

-- Step 2: Recalculate customer monthlyCost aggregates
UPDATE customers c
SET monthlyCost = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0)
  FROM services s
  WHERE s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
    AND s.status != 'terminated'
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Step 1: Update carbonMonthlyCost and monthlyCost for all carbon_api sourced services
UPDATE services
SET
  carbonMonthlyCost = ROUND(carbonMonthlyCost / 1.1, 2),
  monthlyCost = ROUND(monthlyCost / 1.1, 2)
WHERE costSource = 'carbon_api'
  AND carbonMonthlyCost IS NOT NULL
  AND carbonMonthlyCost > 0;

-- Step 2: Recalculate customer monthlyCost aggregates
UPDATE customers c
SET monthlyCost = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0)
  FROM services s
  WHERE s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
    AND s.status != 'terminated'
);
